cases.purpose: Catalog, URL-backed search, product detail, and guest-cart persistence
steps: Reset fixture 1102 at its declared controlled time
Open the home page and follow the first featured product
Add two units to the guest cart and refresh
Verify the same two units and subtotal remain
Search for a fixture-provided tag, filter by its category, and sort price ascending
Verify each visible result matches and result prices are ascending
Navigate Back and verify search state is restored

cases.purpose: Registration, local mailbox, verification, login, and session persistence
steps: Register a new random email with a policy-compliant password
Verify the verification-sent message and one local mailbox message
Open its verification link and sign in
Refresh and verify the signed-in account remains visible
Log out and verify account pages require login

cases.purpose: Account cart and guest cart merge exactly once
steps: As a guest add two units of a product
In a separate signed-in session add one unit of the same product and log out
Return to the guest session and log in with that account
Verify the merged quantity is three or the declared stock/cap, whichever is lower
Refresh and verify the quantity did not merge a second time

cases.purpose: Checkout totals, payment behavior, persisted order, and atomic cancellation
steps: Sign in with a fixture-provided verified account and add in-stock products
Attempt the decline test card and verify the cart and inventory are unchanged
Place a Standard order with the success test card
Verify subtotal, threshold shipping, 8.25 percent tax, total, and last four
Refresh the order detail and verify it remains Placed
Cancel within 30 controlled minutes and verify status Cancelled
Verify each purchased inventory quantity was restored exactly once

cases.purpose: Generic reset request, one-time link, and old-session invalidation
steps: Sign in with a fixture-provided verified account in two browser sessions
Request a password reset and open the local mailbox link
Set a new policy-compliant password
Verify both old sessions are rejected
Verify the old password fails, the new password succeeds, and the link cannot be reused
